text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I decide to wander around<n>the offices
and get to know my fellow<n>trainers a bit better.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You must understand that songs are<n>not merely
words timed to music.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: There is meaning to both the lyricsand the music. While your voice isconsistent...

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: My songs lack feeling. Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, look at the time. We'll<n>continue this
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'll think of a solution. Try to gain a<n>deeper
understanding of the lyrics in<n>the meantime.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: All right. See you tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I saw you there, but I had to wrap<n>things up with
my runner first.
choice_data_list: Of course. Runners should always take priority.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm glad you're of the same<n>opinion.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: So, what can I help you with?
choice_data_list: Would you like to grab a bite to eat together?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...I don't see why not. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't expecting to eat at a<n>karaoke
establishment.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But I think I understand why. You<n>brought me
here because of my<n>conversation with Little
Cocon earlier,<n>correct?
choice_data_list:
I figured the best approach to solve a 
song-related issue is by singing.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely. While it's impossible for<n>me to run
like one of them...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I should be capable of singing. Of<n>course, I'll
need an objective<n>observer to judge my
performance.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I hope you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Phew... How was I?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That's kind, but I feel I wasn't<n>sustaining the
notes long enough.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: It seems I still need practice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
One should not rely solely on data<n>when coming
up with a solution to a<n>problem.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
What Little Cocon requires in her<n>singing is more
emotion. Practicing is<n>the best way for her to
learn this.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Now then, one more try!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Phew... I believe I held my notes well<n>that time.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: So you say, but now I am the onewhose singing lacks emotional depth.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's one thing to giveinstructions, but another to executethem well. I've still got a long ways togo.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Little Cocon is awkward when it<n>comes to her
feelings and has trouble<n>expressing herself.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That's why I must learn to sing with<n>my heart
and serve as an example to<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I need to show her that music has the<n>power to
invoke emotions in others.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Are you prepared? I expect you to<n>accompany
me until I can sing well<n>enough to do so.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As her gentle, yet powerful, voice<n>rises and falls,
I can tell from her song<n>just how much she
cares about her<n>racers.
